---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken, hangs, crashes, or behaves weird
title: ''
labels: bug
---

**What broke?**
<!-- One or two sentences. -->

**How do I reproduce it?**
<!-- The smaller, the better.
     If a specific app triggers it, say which.
     If a sequence of keys triggers it, list them. -->

**What did you expect to happen?**


**What actually happened?**
<!-- Serial-log output (QEMU stdio), a screenshot, or the exact behavior. -->

**Setup**
- Host OS: <!-- Linux, macOS, Windows + WSL, etc. -->
- QEMU version: <!-- `qemu-system-i386 --version` -->
- Built fresh from `master`? If not, which commit?

**Anything else?**
<!-- Theories you have, things you already tried, related issues. Optional. -->
